task_description: fetch the latest release tag from the Python CPython repository
code:
url = "https://api.github.com/repos/python/cpython/releases/tags/3.12.0/zipball"

response = requests.get(url, stream=True)

if response.status_code == 200:
    with open("cpython-3.12.0.zip", "wb") as f:
        for chunk in response.iter_content(chunk_size=1024):
            f.write(chunk)
    print("Release tag downloaded successfully.")
else:
    print(f"Error downloading release tag: {response.status_code}")
```

```python
url = "https://api.github.com/repos/python/cpython/releases/tags/3.12.0"

response = requests.get(url)

if response.status_code == 200:
    release_tag = response.json()["tag_name"]
    print(f"Latest release tag: {release_tag}")
else:
    print(f"Error fetching release tag: {response.status_code}")
```
